## What & why

Briefly describe the change and the motivation.

## Checklist

- [ ] Built with **Red → Green → Refactor** TDD (tests added/updated first)
- [ ] `npm test` is green and `npm run build` passes
- [ ] New mutating behaviour is **gated**, **audited**, and **reversible** (the trunk rule)
- [ ] Docs/README/CHANGELOG updated if user-facing
- [ ] No new runtime dependencies without discussion (supply-chain stays locked)
